# Arabinda Saha | Business Intelligence & Data Analyst

## Who Arabinda Saha is
Arabinda Saha is a Business Intelligence and Data Analyst in India. He builds dashboards, reporting systems, and decision-support workflows for education programs and institutional operations.

## Best-fit opportunities
- Business Intelligence Analyst
- Data Analyst
- Business Data Analyst
- Reporting Analyst
- Operations Analyst
- Analytics Consultant
- Data Consultant
- analytics-heavy business roles around dashboards, reporting systems, KPI tracking, and decision-support workflows
- Selected freelance projects for school dashboards, reporting templates, portfolio sites, and storytelling-led landing pages

## Verified proof
- **Competitive Edge - Diagnostic Assessment Analytics**: Assessment analytics work using Bloom's taxonomy and LOTS-HOTS classification across ~1,000 students and ~10 schools, supporting learning-gap identification, remediation planning, and school-level academic reporting. Case-study visibility through CBSE Sahodaya 2024.
- **LKS Internal Dashboard Work**: Confidential internal dashboard and reporting work covering matter/case performance, revenue indicators, lawyer-level performance indicators, and leadership review. Internal firm data is not exposed.
- **Career Assessment Tool**: Career assessment workflow piloted with 500+ students from Classes 9-12 at KV Kharagpur.
- **Stellar Space Quiz**: ISRO merchandise-partnered National Space Day quiz reaching 600+ schools across 6 states.
- **School Programs, STEM & LMS Work**: School-program delivery across 5+ partner schools, 1,500+ students, and 60+ teachers.
- **School Program Command Centre - Active Prototype**: Dashboard-led product lab prototype using synthetic/sample data. Not yet piloted.

## Core skills and tools
- BI and reporting: Power BI, Excel, Google Sheets, dashboard design, KPI tracking, and management reporting.
- Data analysis: Python, Pandas, Plotly, SQL, data cleaning, and data validation.
- Business workflows: performance tracking, stakeholder reporting, documentation workflows, governance-linked reporting, and decision-support workflows.
- Education analytics: assessment analytics, learning-gap analysis, Bloom's taxonomy, LOTS-HOTS, LMS workflows, and school program dashboards.
- Interface work: portfolio pages, landing pages, information structure, premium digital storefronts, and design/build support for founders, consultants, and small teams.

## Education and foundation
- M.Sc. Mathematics, Jadavpur University.
- 6th-year diploma in classical fine arts.

## Preferred opportunity locations
Kolkata, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Gurugram, Pune, Mumbai, and remote India.
